title: ViR: The Robot Boy
desc: Vir, a robot with human emotions and superhuman abilities, sets out to save the day with the help of his friends, Chulbul, a pet donkey, Imli, an eight-year-old, and Gintu, his magical jinn.

title: Balveer Returns
desc: Baalveer, a young superhero who is helped by the fairies, finds out his successor, Vivaan. Their journey together unfolds a set of magical adventures.

title: CID
desc: A group of efficient and hardworking police officers form a team and work for the state Criminal Investigation Department, investigating criminal cases.
